queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the statistical impact of lacking a checking account on increased credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Credit amount requested by the applicant.
queries.question: Determinants of credit risk mitigation associated with the credit amount requested by the applicant.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: no known savings account.
queries.question: Investigation into the relationship between no known savings account status and reduced credit risk exposure.
